subheadline: See how teams use Desiderio to turn shipped code into customer-ready changelogs, in-app notes, and email digests.

slides.title: Draft release notes from merged PRs
slides.description: Desiderio reads your merged pull requests and writes a clear, on-brand changelog you can approve in one pass.

slides.title: Publish to every channel at once
slides.description: Push the same update to your changelog page, in-app widget, and email digest without rewriting a word.

slides.title: Keep your voice, every release
slides.description: Train Desiderio on past notes so every update sounds like your team wrote it, not a generic AI.
